data_files.wp_cmass_z052.csv: original wp for the full CMASS threshold sample (digitized from Fig 2)

columns_wp.rp_hMpc: projected separation r_p in h^-1 Mpc
columns_wp.wp_hMpc: projected correlation function w_p in h^-1 Mpc

columns_ds.R_hMpc: projected radius R in h^-1 Mpc
columns_ds.ds_Msun_h_pc2: DeltaSigma in M_sun h / pc^2 (paper M_sun/pc^2 divided by h=0.704)

data_source: digitized from Figure 3 of More+2015 (arXiv:1407.1856); wp_cmass_z052.csv from White+2014 Table 2
extraction_method: digitize_fig3.py — auto-detect colored markers, log-scale y-axis calibration
esd_unit_note: Paper ESD is in M_sun/pc^2; divided by h=0.704 to get code unit M_sun h/pc^2
triple_check: wp values decrease monotonically from small to large rp (power-law + BAO regime)
overlay figure: raw_figures/fig3_overlay.png shows extracted points on original figure
notes: More+2015 used a 5-param fit (alpha_inc=1, log10m_inc fixed). WMAP7 cosmology from Table 1 of their paper.
